# BgSwap
> AI-powered product photo background removal and replacement for e-commerce sellers.

## What it does
- Removes background from product photos using AI (Bria AI)
- Generates 15 professional backgrounds per photo: 5 solids (White, Light Gray, Warm, Cool, Dark), 5 gradients (Sunset, Ocean, Mint, Lavender, Peach), 5 textures (Marble, Wood, Linen, Concrete, Paper)
- Outputs marketplace-compliant images for Amazon, Etsy, Shopify, eBay
- Adds realistic drop shadows for professional look
- Processes photos in ~10 seconds

## Pricing (one-time, no subscription)
- Free: 1 photo preview (512px, watermarked)
- Starter: $4.99 for 10 products (15 backgrounds each = 150 images total)
- Pro: $29 for 100 products (15 backgrounds each = 1,500 images total)

## Key differentiators vs remove.bg / PhotoRoom
- 15 marketplace-specific backgrounds per photo (not just background removal)
- Amazon pure white (#FFFFFF) compliance guaranteed
- Batch processing: up to 100 products at once
- One-time payment, no subscription
- Realistic drop shadows included
- ZIP download + email delivery

## Target users
Amazon sellers, Etsy sellers, Shopify store owners, eBay sellers, e-commerce product photographers, small business owners selling physical products online

## Refund policy
7-day money-back guarantee, no questions asked

## Data policy
All uploaded photos automatically deleted after 7 days

## Links
- Website: https://bgswap.io
- Upload: https://bgswap.io/upload
- Pricing: https://bgswap.io/#pricing
